detectors.description: RevenueDistributor.claim() (contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#67-82) ignores return value by paymentToken.transfer(msg.sender,owed) (contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#79)
Escrow.claimRefund() (contracts/Escrow.sol#89-106) ignores return value by paymentToken.transfer(msg.sender,amount) (contracts/Escrow.sol#103)

RevenueDistributor.distribute(uint256) (contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#41-64) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- investorAmount = (afterFee * revenueShareBps) / BPS_DENOMINATOR (contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#48)
	- cumulativeRevenuePerToken += (investorAmount * 1e18) / totalShares (contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#60)
detectors.markdown:
[RevenueDistributor.distribute(uint256)](contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#L41-L64) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [investorAmount = (afterFee * revenueShareBps) / BPS_DENOMINATOR](contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#L48)
	- [cumulativeRevenuePerToken += (investorAmount * 1e18) / totalShares](contracts/RevenueDistributor.sol#L60)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Escrow.deposit(uint256) (contracts/Escrow.sol#50-66):
	External calls:
	- paymentToken.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount) (contracts/Escrow.sol#55)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- totalRaised += amount (contracts/Escrow.sol#57)
	Escrow.totalRaised (contracts/Escrow.sol#19) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Escrow.deposit(uint256) (contracts/Escrow.sol#50-66)
	- Escrow.release() (contracts/Escrow.sol#69-77)
	- Escrow.totalRaised (contracts/Escrow.sol#19)
	- Escrow.triggerRefund() (contracts/Escrow.sol#80-86)
